# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `FR-003`
- Title: `Deliver reliable contact conversion path`
- Persona/Actor: `Prospective client`
- Value statement: `For prospective clients, deliver a reliable contact path to achieve frictionless inquiry initiation.`
- Context: `User reaches contact from global navigation or call-to-action buttons.`
- Problem statement: `A missing or weak contact path reduces conversion and weakens end-user journey completeness.`
- Expected outcome: `Contact section is always reachable and clearly communicates how to initiate contact.`
- Success metric(s): `Contact section link and anchor checks pass in E2E on all key routes.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Top-level navigation contains a contact entry.`
  - `Contact section includes at least one direct channel and response expectation text.`
  - `All contact entry points resolve correctly on desktop and mobile breakpoints.`
- Non-goals: `Server-side form processing, CRM integration, spam scoring workflows.`
- Constraints: `No secret exposure, static-first implementation in Phase 1.`
- Dependencies: `FR-001 hero CTA behavior, accessibility checks.`
- Risks/assumptions: `Assumes contact channels are finalized by content owner before release.`
- Validation approach: `Playwright navigation smoke test, responsive viewport checks, accessibility checks on contact section.`
- Priority score: `92`
- Target window: `Phase 1`
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: `requirements-log.md#FR-003`
  - ADR: `n/a`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
